content.full_text:
TO: [x]JEANNE          [ ]JAY                                FROM:Lynn
    [ ]LYNN            [x] BARBARA
    [ ]RICH            [x] BOB S.
    [ ]HELEN           [x ] OTHER Janie and Bob L.

    [x]TELEPHONE ADVICE - SEE BELOW

    [ ]CORRESPONDENCE ADVICE - SEE ATTACHED DRAFT
              (IF YOU HAVE ANY COMMENTS, NOTIFY ADVISOR WITHIN 1 DAY)

    FILE LOCATION:            86203

    INCLUDE IN ADVICE PACKAGE:          YES [ ]        NO [ ]


    CALLER        Jasper Hempel

    REPRESENTING Western Growers Assn.

    PHONE NUMBER:     446-1435


QUESTION: Western Growers has an annual Bar-B-Que for its members. This
          year they would like to invite retiring ag legislators (e.g.
          John Thurman). The Bar-B-Que has been held previously at one
          of their lobbyist's home. Would holding the event at a lobbyist
          residence make the benefit to the legislators subject to the $10
          limitation?

ANSWER:   By providing the residence and having it designated on the in-
          vitation as the location of the gift giving, the lobbyist is
          facilitating the making of the gift and the $10 limitation
          would therefore apply.

sections.question:
Western Growers has an annual Bar-B-Que for its members. This year they would like to invite retiring ag legislators (e.g., John Thurman). The Bar-B-Que has been held previously at one of their lobbyist's home. Would holding the event at a lobbyist residence make the benefit to the legislators subject to the $10 limitation?

ANSWER: By providing the residence and having it designated on the invitation as the location of the gift giving, the lobbyist is facilitating the making of the gift and the $10 limitation would therefore apply.
